title: psychanthus gjellerupii
side_effects: Psychanthus gjellerupii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and rashes, as well as respiratory issues like coughing, sneezing, and shortness of breath. Overconsumption of the plant's extracts can also lead to gastrointestinal problems, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In some cases, improper use of Psychanthus gjellerupii may cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat, low blood pressure, and in severe cases, cardiac arrest. Long-term misuse of the plant can also contribute to neurological problems, including dizziness, confusion, and even seizures in extreme cases.
